debug_info.goal:
case refine_1
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
this : @S b = true
c : Error.Agent n
o : Error.maxOne n (Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ)
a_not_know_before_t :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
a_not_know_before_f :
  ¬Error.eval n S ⟨σ, Error.Sequence.maxOne_cons n (Error.Call.normal n a c) σ o⟩
      (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false)))
a_knows_after_t : Error.eval n S ⟨Error.Call.normal n a c :: σ, o⟩ (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true)))
⊢ (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩ ∨
    (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n c S ⟨σ, Error.resultSet._proof_2 n σ a c o⟩

failed_attempts:
by_cases hab : b = a
              · left; subst hab; simp [this]
              · by_cases hcb : b = c
                · right; subst hcb; simp [this]
                · -- If b ≠ a and b ≠ c, then b is not involved in the call
                  -- So a must have had (b, S b) before to know it after
                  exfalso
                  simp only [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def] at a_not_know_before_t a_not_know_before_f
                  have hSb : S b = true := this
                  apply a_not_know_before_t
                  intro T τ same_len equ
                  rw [know_self _ _ _ _ _ equ]
                  exact hSb

have h_true := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [this] at h_true ⊢
              unfold resultSet at h_true
              simp only [roleOfIn_a, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq,
                not_forall, not_and, not_exists] at h_true
              exact h_true.1.1

unfold resultSet at this
              simp only [roleOfIn_a, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at this
              exact this.1.1

have h_true := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [resultSet, ra] at h_true
              simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union] at h_true
              rcases h_true with ⟨⟨h_in, _⟩, _⟩
              rw [this]
              exact h_in

simp only [this]
              by_cases hab : b = a
              · left; subst hab; simp [stubbornness, this]
              · by_cases hcb : b = c
                · right; subst hcb; simp [stubbornness, this]
                · -- a knows (b,true)@b after, but didn't before, so c must have had it
                  right
                  have knew_after := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                  simp only [resultSet, roleOfIn_a] at knew_after
                  simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union] at knew_after
                  rcases knew_after with ⟨⟨h_union, _⟩, _⟩
                  cases h_union with
                  | inl h => 
                    exfalso
                    simp only [eval, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def] at a_not_know_before_t
                    apply a_not_know_before_t S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ rfl equiv_refl
                    simp only [this]; exact h
                  | inr h => simp only [this] at h ⊢; exact h

simp only [this]
              by_cases hba : b = a
              · left; subst hba; simp [stubbornness _ ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ rfl, this]
              · by_cases hbc : b = c
                · right; subst hbc; simp [stubbornness _ ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ rfl, this]
                · exfalso
                  apply a_not_know_before_t
                  simp only [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def]
                  intro T τ same_len equ
                  simp only [know_self _ _ _ _ _ equ, this]

simp only [this]
              have h_in : (b, true) ∈ S⌈⟨⌜a c⌝ :: σ, o⟩⌉a := by simp [this]
              unfold resultSet at h_in
              simp only [roleOfIn_a, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_in
              rcases h_in with ⟨⟨h_union, _⟩, _⟩
              exact h_union
rcases h.1.1 with (h1|h1) <;> [left; right] <;> exact h1

have h := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [resultSet, roleOfIn_a, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union] at h
              rw [this]
              rcases h with ⟨⟨h_in, _⟩, _⟩
              exact h_in

have h_after := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [resultSet, roleOfIn_a, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union] at h_after
              rw [this]
              rcases h_after.1.1 with (hl | hr)
              · left; exact hl
              · right; exact hr

have knows_true := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [eval, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq, this] at knows_true
              exact knows_true.1.1

have h_true := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [eval, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_true
              rcases h_true with ⟨⟨in_union, _⟩, _⟩
              simp only [this]
              exact in_union

simp only [this]
              have h := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [eval, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union] at h
              rcases h with ⟨⟨h_in, _⟩, _⟩
              exact h_in

by_cases hab : b = a
              · left; subst hab; rw [this]; simp [stubbornness]
              · by_cases hcb : b = c
                · right; subst hcb; rw [this]; simp [stubbornness]
                · exfalso
                  apply a_not_know_before_t
                  simp only [eval, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def]
                  intro T τ same_len equ
                  rw [stubbornness _ ⟨τ, _⟩ same_len]
                  have := know_self _ ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ ⟨τ, _⟩ rfl same_len equ
                  simp_all

have h_true := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [resultSet, ra, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_true
              rcases h_true with ⟨⟨h_union, _⟩, _⟩
              rw [this]
              exact h_union

have h_true := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [eval, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union] at h_true
              rw [this]
              rcases h_true with ⟨⟨h_mem, _⟩, _⟩
              exact h_mem

have h_after := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [eval] at h_after
              unfold resultSet at h_after
              simp only [roleOfIn_a, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_after
              rcases h_after with ⟨⟨h_in, _⟩, _⟩
              simp_all

have h_truth := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [eval, resultSet, roleOfIn_a] at h_truth
              simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_truth
              rcases h_truth.1.1 with (h_left | h_right)
              · left; simp_all
              · right; simp_all

have h_true := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [eval, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_true
              rcases h_true with ⟨⟨h_union, _⟩, _⟩
              rw [this]
              exact h_union

by_cases hab : b = a
              · left; subst hab; simp [stubbornness]
              · by_cases hcb : b = c
                · right; subst hcb; simp [stubbornness]
                · -- If b ≠ a and b ≠ c, then b is not in the call
                  -- The value (b, S b) must be in either a's or c's result set
                  -- Since a gained knowledge of b in this call, c must have had it
                  have key : (b, true) ∈ S⌈⟨σ, ⁻o⟩⌉a ∨ (b, true) ∈ S⌈⟨σ, ⁻o⟩⌉c := by
                    simp only [this]
                    by_contra h_neither
                    push_neg at h_neither
                    -- If neither had the value, a couldn't have learned it
                    simp only [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def] at a_knows_after_t
                    -- This leads to contradiction with a_not_know_before_t
                    exfalso
                    apply a_not_know_before_t
                    simp only [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def]
                    intro T τ same_len equ
                    have := know_self _ _ _ _ _ equ
                    simp_all
                  simp only [this] at key
                  exact key

by_cases hab : b = a
              · left; subst hab; rw [stubbornness]; rfl
              · by_cases hcb : b = c
                · right; subst hcb; rw [stubbornness]; rfl
                · -- If b ≠ a and b ≠ c, then b is Other in the call, so a's knowledge about b
                  -- before and after should be the same, contradiction
                  exfalso
                  have rb : roleOfIn b ⌜a c⌝ = Other := by simp [hab, hcb]
                  have : eval S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ (Kv a b) → eval S ⟨⌜a c⌝ :: σ, o⟩ (Kv a b) := by
                    intro h; exact knowledge_of_secrets_is_preserved h (by simp)
                  rw [eval_dis] at this
                  simp only [not_or, not_not] at this
                  exact a_not_know_before_t (this ⟨a_not_know_before_t, a_not_know_before_f⟩).1

by_cases hab : a = b
              · left; subst hab; simp [this]
              · by_cases hcb : c = b
                · right; subst hcb; simp [this]
                · exfalso
                  apply a_not_know_before_t
                  simp only [eval, stubbornness, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def]
                  intro T τ same_len equ
                  have h := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                  simp only [eval, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_forall,
                    not_and, Bool.not_eq_not, exists_prop] at h
                  simp only [this] at h
                  exact h

have knowledge_true := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [eval] at knowledge_true
              unfold resultSet at knowledge_true
              simp only [roleOfIn_a] at knowledge_true
              simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at knowledge_true
              rcases knowledge_true with ⟨⟨h_union, _⟩, _⟩
              rw [this]
              exact h_union

by_cases hab : b = a
              · subst hab; left; simp [this]
              · by_cases hcb : b = c
                · subst hcb; right; simp [this]
                · -- a knows (b, true) after call, so (b, true) must be in the union before
                  -- By true_of_knowldege, (b, true) ∈ resultSet a S after call
                  have h_true := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                  simp only [eval] at h_true
                  unfold resultSet at h_true
                  simp only [roleOfIn_a] at h_true
                  simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_true
                  rcases h_true with ⟨⟨h_in, _⟩, _⟩
                  rw [this]
                  exact h_in

by_cases h : (b, S b) ∈ S⌈⟨σ, ⁻o⟩⌉a
              · left; exact h
              · right
                have know_after := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                simp only [resultSet, roleOfIn_a, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union] at know_after
                rcases know_after.1.1 with (in_a | in_c)
                · exfalso; rw [this] at h; exact h in_a
                · rw [this]; exact in_c

right
              have t_of_k := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
              simp only [resultSet, roleOfIn_a, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union] at t_of_k
              rcases t_of_k.1.1 with (h_in_a | h_in_c)
              · exfalso
                apply a_not_know_before_t
                exact (local_is_known true).1 S ⟨σ, ⁻o⟩ h_in_a
              · simp_all

simp only [eval, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_forall, 
            exists_prop, exists_and_left] at know_t
          rcases know_t with ⟨⟨in_union, _⟩, _⟩
          exact in_union

by_cases hab : b = a
              · left; subst hab; simp [stubbornness]
              · by_cases hcb : b = c
                · right; subst hcb; simp [stubbornness]
                · -- a doesn't know b's value before, but knows after, so c must have contributed it
                  -- Since a knows (b, true) after the call, and didn't know before,
                  -- c must have (b, true) = (b, S b) in their result set
                  right
                  have knows_after := true_of_knowldege a_knows_after_t
                  simp only [eval, Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at knows_after
                  rcases knows_after with ⟨⟨in_union, _⟩, _⟩
                  rcases in_union with in_a | in_c
                  · -- If a had it, then a would have known before - contradiction
                    exfalso
                    apply a_not_know_before_t
                    simp only [eval, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def]
                    intro T τ same_len equ
                    rw [stubbornness _ _ rfl]
                    have := indistinguishable_then_same_values ⟨same_len, equ⟩
                    simp only [this] at in_a
                    rw [stubbornness _ _ rfl] at in_a
                    exact in_a
                  · simp_all

simp only [eval] at h_true
              unfold resultSet at h_true
              simp only [roleOfIn_a] at h_true
              simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h_true
              rcases h_true with ⟨⟨h_in, _⟩, _⟩
              simp_all

simp only [eval, Subtype.forall, OSequence.length_def] at a_knows_after_t
              have h := a_knows_after_t S ⟨⌜a c⌝ :: σ, o⟩ rfl equiv_refl
              simp only [stubbornness] at h
              rw [this] at h
              -- a has (b, true) after the call, meaning someone contributed it
              unfold resultSet at h
              simp only [roleOfIn_a] at h
              simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at h
              rcases h with ⟨⟨h_or, _⟩, _⟩
              rw [this]
              exact h_or
